questions.question: In an adaptive algorithm for sorting nearly sorted data, which strategy is usually most efficient?
options: Use insertion sort because it performs well on nearly sorted arrays
Use bubble sort because it compares all adjacent pairs repeatedly
Use selection sort because it always minimizes swaps
Use merge sort because recursion depth is always constant
questions.explanation: Insertion sort runs close to linear time when the array is already almost sorted.

questions.question: Which database index type is generally most suitable for range queries on ordered values?
questions.explanation: B-tree indexes keep keys ordered, which supports efficient range scans.

questions.question: In adaptive query optimization, what does the optimizer primarily use to revise execution plans at runtime?
questions.explanation: Adaptive optimization uses runtime feedback like actual row counts to improve plans.

questions.question: Why can dynamic programming be considered adaptive in many algorithmic problems?
options: It discards all previous computations at each step
It adapts by reusing optimal subproblem solutions based on problem state
It always converts recursion to random guessing
It requires no relation between subproblems
questions.explanation: Dynamic programming adapts to state transitions by reusing previously computed results.

questions.question: For a transactional database, which ACID property ensures that either all operations in a transaction happen or none do?
Who led Chennai Super Kings as captain to multiple IPL titles in the early and middle eras?
questions.explanation: MS Dhoni has captained CSK to several IPL championship wins.

questions.question: Which team won the inaugural IPL season in 2008?
questions.explanation: Rajasthan Royals won the first IPL season under Shane Warne.

questions.question: Which captain is strongly associated with Mumbai Indians' multiple IPL title runs?
questions.explanation: Rohit Sharma captained Mumbai Indians to multiple IPL titles.

questions.question: Who holds the record for the highest individual score in an IPL innings (as of recent seasons)?
questions.explanation: Chris Gayle's 175* remains one of the most iconic IPL batting records.

questions.question: Which captain led Kolkata Knight Riders to IPL titles in the 2010s?
questions.explanation: Gautam Gambhir captained KKR to championship wins in 2012 and 2014.
